name: flutter_devtools_mcp
description: Zero-config MCP server for Flutter UI automation. Connects to Flutter debug apps via VM Service WebSocket — per-call vmServiceUrl or mDNS auto-discovery.

tools.name: snapshot
tools.description: Get current widget tree as LLM-friendly JSON

tools.name: inspect
tools.description: Get detailed properties of a specific widget node

tools.name: get_parent_chain
tools.description: Get ancestor chain from a node up to root widget

tools.name: get_render_tree
tools.description: Dump the render object tree as text

tools.name: get_layer_tree
tools.description: Dump the compositing layer tree as text

tools.name: tap
tools.description: Tap a widget by selector (semantics:, key:, text:, index:)

tools.name: type_text
tools.description: Focus a text field and enter text

tools.name: press_back
tools.description: Press system back / pop top route

tools.name: evaluate
tools.description: Evaluate Dart expression in running app

tools.name: get_logs
tools.description: Capture recent app output (stdout, stderr, log())
